scripts.test:integration: npm run db:migrate:local && start-server-and-test "npm run dev:local" http://127.0.0.1:8788/health "vitest run tests/db.integration.test.js"
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.db:migrate:local: npx -y wrangler d1 execute riannahs-plants-dev --local --file=./migrations/0001_init.sql --config wrangler.toml
